---
title: "cluster_mass_map"
generated: true
description: "Per-voxel cluster *mass*: the component's summed excess statistic."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.inference.cluster`](../nitrix-stats-inference-cluster.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:cluster_mass_map -->
```python
cluster_mass_map(labels: Int[Array, '*spatial'], stat: Float[Array, '*spatial'], threshold: float) -> Float[Array, '*spatial']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:cluster_mass_map -->
Per-voxel cluster *mass*: the component's summed excess statistic.

The excess statistic $\max(\mathrm{stat} - \mathrm{threshold}, 0)$
is summed over each supra-threshold component and assigned to every voxel
of that component; background voxels map to `0`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:cluster_mass_map -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `labels` | `Int` | `*spatial` | — | Integer label image of shape `(*spatial)`; `0` denotes background and `1 .. K` the connected components, as produced by `connected_components`. |
| `stat` | `Float` | `*spatial` | — | Statistic image of shape `(*spatial)` from which the excess above `threshold` is computed. |
| `threshold` | `float` | — | — | Height threshold subtracted from `stat` before clipping at zero. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `*spatial`. Array of shape `(*spatial)` giving the cluster mass of each voxel's component; background voxels carry `0`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:cluster_mass_map -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
